title: Zero-Trust E2E Validation of Full Pipeline
description: Verify the full pipeline works end-to-end from scratch, trusting NOTHING from prior work. Verify adapters, parsers, hooks, init scaffolding, directive lifecycle, and integration. Fix any breakage discovered.

dod.criterion: PlatformAdapter and SpawnAdapter compile, instantiate, and pass method-level verification
JSONL session parsing correctly extracts session metadata from real session files
All 4 hook scripts produce correct output for valid and invalid inputs
Init scaffolding produces valid project structures for multiple team configs
Full integration smoke test passes: synthetic directive through all validation gates

tasks.title: Verify PlatformAdapter and SpawnAdapter Compile and Function
tasks.user_scenario: When a developer runs the server, PlatformAdapter and SpawnAdapter implementations load without import errors and pass type-checking.
tasks.scope: Zero-trust verification of ClaudeCodeAdapter and ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter. Verify imports, instantiation, method calls. Write scripts/validate-adapters.ts. Fix any breakage.

dod.criterion: npm run type-check passes with zero errors touching server/platform/*.ts files
scripts/validate-adapters.ts instantiates ClaudeCodeAdapter and calls discoverSessionFiles() + getPlatformCapabilities() without throwing
scripts/validate-adapters.ts verifies ClaudeCodeSpawnAdapter buildArgs output includes -p flag, --agent flag when agentId set, --dangerously-skip-permissions when skipPermissions true
Any import resolution failures or type mismatches are fixed in-place

tasks.title: Verify JSONL Session Parsing End-to-End
tasks.user_scenario: When the server processes a real JSONL session file, it correctly extracts session ID, model, agent state, tool counts, and prompt text.
tasks.scope: Zero-trust verification of JSONL parsing pipeline: session-state.ts and session-scanner.ts. Write scripts/validate-session-parsing.ts using a real session file. Fix parsing bugs.

dod.criterion: scripts/validate-session-parsing.ts runs against a real JSONL file and reports sessionId, model, machineState, toolUseCount as non-null/non-zero
toSessionActivity returns a SessionActivity with session_id and project fields populated
getAgentState correctly maps all four MachineState->AgentState transitions
Any parsing failures or field-mapping bugs are fixed with before/after documentation

tasks.title: Verify All Hook Scripts Execute Correctly
tasks.user_scenario: When the pipeline runs validation hooks, each produces correct JSON output for both valid and invalid inputs.
tasks.scope: Zero-trust verification of all 4 hook scripts. Test each with valid and invalid input. Run existing gate tests. Fix any broken scripts.
bugs_fixed: run-tests.sh used 'review' as step name but validate-gate.sh case statement uses 'review-gate'. Fixed test to use 'review-gate'.

dod.criterion: validate-cast.sh returns {valid:true} for a well-formed plan.json and catches builder-as-reviewer violation
validate-project-json.sh returns {valid:true} for a complete project.json and catches missing-agent violation
validate-gate.sh returns valid JSON for at least 2 step targets against a real or fixture directive
All existing tests in .claude/hooks/tests/gate/run-tests.sh pass
Any script bugs (exit codes, jq errors, path resolution) are fixed in-place

tasks.title: Verify gruai init Scaffolds Correctly for Multiple Team Configs
tasks.user_scenario: When a new user runs npx gru-ai init, they get a complete scaffolded project with agents, registry, skills, context tree, and CLAUDE.md that all reference each other correctly.
tasks.scope: Zero-trust verification of init scaffolding. Create temp directories and run scaffolding. Verify all files exist and are valid. Test idempotency. Write scripts/validate-init.ts. Fix bugs.

dod.criterion: scripts/validate-init.ts creates a temp directory, runs scaffolding, and verifies agent-registry.json has valid schema
All agent personality files exist in .claude/agents/ with non-empty content
4 skill directories (directive, scout, healthcheck, report) each contain SKILL.md
.context/ tree has vision.md, lessons/index.md, directives/.gitkeep, preferences.md, backlog.json
CLAUDE.md contains an agent roster table with all generated agent names

tasks.title: Verify Directive Lifecycle State Machine
tasks.user_scenario: When a directive progresses through pipeline steps, the directive-watcher correctly reads directive.json and handles weight-based step skipping.
tasks.scope: Zero-trust verification of directive lifecycle. Verify buildPipelineFromDirective, SKIPPED_STEPS, step IDs match between watcher and validate-gate.sh. Write scripts/validate-directive-lifecycle.ts.

dod.criterion: scripts/validate-directive-lifecycle.ts verifies all 14 pipeline step IDs match between directive-watcher.ts and validate-gate.sh
Lightweight directive correctly skips challenge, brainstorm, approve (3 steps skipped, 11 active)
Medium directive correctly skips challenge only (1 step skipped, 13 active)
Heavyweight and strategic directives skip nothing (14 active steps each)
A synthetic directive.json at current_step='execute' shows correct step statuses

tasks.title: Full Integration Smoke Test with Synthetic Directive
tasks.user_scenario: When the full system runs together — adapters, parsers, watchers, hooks, lifecycle — a directive can progress from creation through validation gates without errors.
tasks.scope: Create comprehensive integration test tying all components together. Write scripts/validate-integration.ts. Create synthetic directive, run hooks, verify adapters, check type-check passes. Fix integration issues.

dod.criterion: scripts/validate-integration.ts creates a complete synthetic directive tree and all 3 hook scripts return {valid:true}
validate-gate.sh passes for triage, plan, and execute steps in sequence against the synthetic directive
ClaudeCodeAdapter instantiates without errors and discoverSessionFiles returns a Map
npm run type-check passes with zero errors across the entire codebase
A summary report is printed listing all validation results with pass/fail counts
